name: New Sybaris
description:
In a city of hedonism and gluttony, what will you be?

Welcome to the insatiable city of New Sybaris! A town where gluttony and pleasure are the norm and expectation. Visit the various districts- from the bustling streets of City Center to the relaxed Bayview, the opulent Gainsborough and the rough & tumble Chatham. Meet new friends, experience what the city can offer, and prepare to get some bigger clothes.

Additional Tags: feedee, feeder, feederism, weight gain, chubby, obese
creator: f00bar2
